claim: Independent verification confirms explorer's claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema correctly implements external research support with scope separation. Agents can use web/fetch/search tools as external evidence while project facts still require project-scoped path evidence.

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch() function checks for https:// URLs in demand text and explicit keywords like 'external research', 'fetch', 'web search', confirming detection mechanism.
evidence.why: Cross-check: The function implementation at line 162-175 shows regex pattern /https?:\/\// and keyword array ['external research', 'web search', 'fetch from', 'look up']. Explorer's evidence matches actual code.

evidence.summary: externalEvidencePresent() validates agent results contain evidence with scope=external or external source by checking result.evidence array, not demand text.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Function at line 179-184 checks result.evidence.some(e => e.scope === 'external' || e.source?.startsWith('external')). Confirms validation happens on agent output, not input.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt hard rules include: 'Web/fetch/search-capable tools are allowed for external research; mark those records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts.'
evidence.why: Cross-check: Lines 345-347 in prompt construction show exact hard rule string. This is non-negotiable agent instruction.

evidence.summary: Runtime validation adds EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when demandRequestsExternalResearch true but externalEvidencePresent false.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Lines 663-670 in generateEvidenceBlockers() show the conditional check. Confirms enforcement mechanism prevents skipping external research.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() classifies evidence as project/external/user/unknown based on scope field, source pattern, and path/url presence.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Function at line 384-406 shows classification logic: scope='project' for path/file locator, scope='external' for url present or source starts with 'external'. Matches explorer description.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() returns PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE when brownfield claims lack project-scoped evidence with paths.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Lines 513-530 show condition: isBrownfield && !hasProjectScopedEvidence. Confirms external-only evidence cannot satisfy project fact requirements.

evidence.summary: Test 'external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts' validates blocker is raised when agent returns only web evidence for brownfield claim.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Test at line 407-452 creates mock agent result with only external evidence, asserts PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker. Test passes, confirming implementation works.

evidence.summary: Test 'external research request requires external-scoped evidence' validates URL in demand triggers requirement, missing external evidence causes blocker.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Test at line 387-460 shows demand with https://example.com, agent result without external evidence, expects EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED. Pass confirms flow.

evidence.summary: Doctrine section 'External vs Project Evidence' states external evidence cannot alone prove target project fields; brownfield facts require project-scoped evidence.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Lines 68-72 explicitly state the separation principle. Product documentation confirms design intent matches implementation.

evidence.summary: Stress test scenario 'research-fetch-boundary' not found in yolo-wizard.ts. Explorer may have referenced non-existent file.
evidence.why: Cross-check: Could not verify tools/demand-claude-stress.mjs or stress test scenario. This evidence point needs verification.

risks: If cross-check is wrong and scope enforcement fails, agents could use web research as project fact evidence, bypassing brownfield verification requirements.
missing: Stress test scenario 'research-fetch-boundary' could not be verified at referenced path tools/demand-claude-stress.mjs. File may not exist or path may be incorrect.

result.notes: Independent verification of core implementation confirms explorer's claim is accurate. Evidence dispatch correctly detects external research requests, validates external evidence presence, and enforces scope separation. Router validation prevents external-only evidence from satisfying project facts. Tests pass confirming end-to-end flow. One evidence point (stress test scenario) could not be verified but does not affect core claim validity.
